title: Designing Claude Skills, Workflows, and Agents
excerpt: A practical guide to the three building blocks of Claude-powered automation — skills for reusable prompts, agents for parallel work, and workflows for deterministic multi-step orchestration.

title: Managing Rust Dependencies and Tracking SBOMs
excerpt: How to keep your Cargo dependency tree clean, audit it for known vulnerabilities, and generate a Software Bill of Materials you can actually use.

title: Using an LLM Agent to Write Good Jira Stories
excerpt: How to prompt and constrain an LLM agent so it outputs well-formed Jira stories — user role, goal, benefit, description, and tight acceptance criteria every time.

title: Building Agent Skills, Memory, and Rules
excerpt: A practical guide to the three primitives that make an LLM agent actually useful: skills it can invoke, memory it can recall, and rules that keep it on track.

title: Benchmarking LLMs: What to Measure and How
excerpt: A practical guide to measuring LLM latency, throughput, quality, and cost — without getting fooled by leaderboard numbers.

title: Secret Topology in HashiCorp Vault
excerpt: How to structure mount paths, policies, and auth methods so that Vault scales cleanly across teams and environments.

title: Deploying a Static Site to GitHub Pages
excerpt: A complete guide to deploying and maintaining a static site on GitHub Pages — custom domains, Jekyll pitfalls, and keeping it fast.

title: Getting Started with Rust
excerpt: A practical introduction to Rust — ownership, the borrow checker, cargo, and the patterns that make it click for systems work.
